title: Animated RGB GUI Pack
description:
A GUI pack to make an animated RGB XP bar, hotbar, and Inventory screens!

OptiFine or Animatica (Fabric) is required.
body:
**IMPORTANT: OptiFine (if available) or [Animatica (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica) is required in order to see animated wave effect!**

**If you are using OptiFine, make sure the "Textures Animated" options are ON, otherwise it won't work for them.**

## Description:

It is a resource pack in order to have animated RGB clear GUI (Only works with OptiFine) with wave effect, with a total of 40 frames!

## Features:

Almost everything is animated, not only does it include the Hotbar RGB in the HUD, but, it also includes all the inventory screens:

- Anvil
- Beacon
- Brewing Stand
- Crafting Table
- Dispenser
- Enchanting Table
- Furnace
- All chest GUI
- Hopper
- Horse
- Inventory
- Smithing v1 and v2
- Villager v2
- Creative Inventory

And not only that, but it also includes some modified GUI menu textures as long as it looks dark, the tile that uses it for BG menu is "Deepslate Tiles" and the panorama background is about "Deep Dark".

## Animated Screenshot:

![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/RCF9LDx.gif)

## Terms of use:

**You’re allowed to:**

- Make review about this pack, as long as you credit me as “@CrisXolt”. And put original download link in description (This Modrinth forum post).
 

**You’re NOT allowed to:**

- Repost this resource pack made by me in other pages.
Do not use it to merge with third-party projects/resource packs without permission, much less to merge with “Concept Clients” resource packs.

### **Just enjoy and good luck! ;D.**
